name: @opentelemetry/resources
usage_summary: Imported in DefaultMeterProvider.ts. One symbol used: Resource, which is instantiated with a SERVICE_NAME attribute (sourced from @opentelemetry/semantic-conventions) and passed to the MeterProvider constructor as the resource descriptor. This attaches service identity metadata to every exported metric data point.
total_releases_24m_note: npm registry fetch was unavailable (network/WebFetch access denied during audit). Releases in lockstep with @opentelemetry/sdk-metrics; estimated 8-12 releases in the 24-month window.
how_to_remove: The Resource constructor call could technically be replaced by passing a plain object if MeterProvider's API allowed it, but the sdk-metrics MeterProvider requires an actual Resource instance. Removal requires eliminating the entire OTel stack, not just this one package.
replacement_reason: Tightly coupled to @opentelemetry/sdk-metrics MeterProvider constructor. Cannot be substituted without replacing the SDK itself.
